temporaryConfig.reason: live monitor is read-only; provider switching/restoration is performed outside this script

sameTaskAffinityFallbackBlocked.reason: 未在监测窗口内观察到同任务 429 -> cooldown -> fallback_blocked(hard_affinity)

newRequestAvoidsExhaustedCooldown.reason: 未观察到后续新请求避开 exhausted/cooldown 账号

quotaContinuityVerdict.reason: 监测窗口内未观察到完整 quota exhaustion 链路

results.name: same_task_affinity_fallback_blocked
results.reason: 未在监测窗口内观察到同任务 429 -> cooldown -> fallback_blocked(hard_affinity)

results.name: sticky_reset_wait_not_killed_by_local_timeout
results.reason: 未观察到 hard-affinity continuation request_trace；旧 audit 可能尚未包含该结构化追踪字段

results.name: structured_behavior_trace_present
results.reason: 当前 audit 仍是旧事件模型，缺少 request_trace/routing_decision/quota_classification/stream_terminal；请确认实跑使用的是当前源码构建出的 gateway，而不是过期 target/debug 二进制

results.name: new_request_avoids_exhausted_account
results.reason: 未观察到后续新请求避开 exhausted/cooldown 账号

results.name: multi_account_fallback_observed
results.reason: 未要求多账号 quota recovery 计数；仅记录多账号观察结果

results.name: in_flight_streams_survive_account_exhaustion
results.reason: 未观察到账号 usage_limit_reached 耗尽事件

results.name: client_aborted_streams_classified
results.reason: 观察到 client_aborted；已分类到 report，但仅凭 audit 不能归因为客户端主动中断、恢复失败或服务端异常

safetyNotes: it hashes ~/.codex/config.toml and ~/.codex/auth.json but does not read or write their contents
it does not start, stop, restart, or kill Codex App, Codex CLI, or Cockpit services
it does not switch providers or restore manual provider changes
use the App-safe isolated acceptance script when temporary provider config must be created and restored automatically
